title: IBM Guardium AI Security
description: IBM Guardium AI Security allows you to discover shadow AI, secure all AI models and use cases, get real-time protection from malicious prompts, and align teams on common set of metrics—for secure and trustworthy AI.

items: Enforce zero-trust policies between agents, tools, & external APIs, Apply & manage runtime Guardrails
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
Generate & verify model + agent + tool SBOMs - shared responsibility, Register all agents in an internal trust registry
Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
